revision.comment: wookiee copy rather
revision.text: :"''{{{1}}}''" :—{{{2}}}__NOTOC__ ==Usage instructions== {{excerpt|{{quote|''quote''|''attribution''|''source''}}}} ===Notes=== *If any text is assigned to the ''source'' field, it will be rendered as a browser [[Wikipedia:Tool tip|tool tip]]. ==Example== ====Code==== {{excerpt|{{quote|The Force will be with you. Always.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope}}}} ====Result==== {{quote|The Force will be with you. Always.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope}} ==See also== *[[Template:Quotetrans]] *[[Template:Qlisten]] *[[Template:Quote2]] ==Note== As a heavily used, high-visibility template, this template is protected from editing by anonymous or newly registered users. [[Category:Utility templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: wookiee copy rather
revision.text: :"''{{{1}}}''" :—{{{2}}}__NOTOC__ ==Usage instructions== {{excerpt|{{quote|''quote''|''attribution''|''source''}}}} ===Notes=== *If any text is assigned to the ''source'' field, it will be rendered as a browser [[Wikipedia:Tool tip|tool tip]]. ==Example== ====Code==== {{excerpt|{{quote|The Force will be with you. Always.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope}}}} ====Result==== {{quote|The Force will be with you. Always.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope}} ==See also== *[[Template:Quotetrans]] *[[Template:Qlisten]] *[[Template:Quote2]] ==Note== As a heavily used, high-visibility template, this template is protected from editing by anonymous or newly registered users. [[Category:Utility templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.text: :"''{{{1}}}''" :—{{{2}}}__NOTOC__ ==Usage instructions== {{excerpt|{{quote|''quote''|''attribution''|''source''}}}} ===Notes=== *If any text is assigned to the ''source'' field, it will be rendered as a browser [[Wikipedia:Tool tip|tool tip]]. ==Example== ====Code==== {{excerpt|{{quote|The Force will be with you. Always.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope}}}} ====Result==== {{quote|The Force will be with you. Always.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope}} ==See also== *[[Template:Quotetrans]] *[[Template:Qlisten]] *[[Template:Quote2]] ==Note== As a heavily used, high-visibility template, this template is protected from editing by anonymous or newly registered users. [[Category:Utility templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Skip {{lorem ipsum}} on transclusions to save resources per details on [[Wikipedia:Template limits]]. Don't let {{lorem ipsum}} show up in lists of transcluded templates on ordinary pages
revision.text:
{{For|linking a subject to a collection of quotations on [[Wikiquote]]|Template:Wikiquote}} {{-}} {{{{FULLPAGENAME}}|{{lorem ipsum}}|Someone|Someone's full name|''Source''}}

{{{1|Insert the text of the quote here, without quotation marks. {{lorem ipsum}}}}}

{{#if:{{{2|Someone}}}|

—[[{{{2}}}|{{{3|{{{2|}}}}}}]]{{#if:{{{4|Source}}}|, {{{4}}}}}

}}
{{-}} ==Usage== {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody}} produces: {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody}} {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody|Somebody's full name}} produces: {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody|Somebody's full name}} {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody|Somebody's full name|topic}} produces: {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody|Somebody's full name|topic}} {{esoteric}} [[fr:modèle:citation]] [[it:Template:quote]] [[Category:Quotation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: wookiee copy rather
revision.text: :"''{{{1}}}''" :—{{{2}}}__NOTOC__ ==Usage instructions== {{excerpt|{{quote|''quote''|''attribution''|''source''}}}} ===Notes=== *If any text is assigned to the ''source'' field, it will be rendered as a browser [[Wikipedia:Tool tip|tool tip]]. ==Example== ====Code==== {{excerpt|{{quote|The Force will be with you. Always.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope}}}} ====Result==== {{quote|The Force will be with you. Always.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope}} ==See also== *[[Template:Quotetrans]] *[[Template:Qlisten]] *[[Template:Quote2]] ==Note== As a heavily used, high-visibility template, this template is protected from editing by anonymous or newly registered users. [[Category:Utility templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.text: :"''{{{1}}}''" :—{{{2}}}__NOTOC__ ==Usage instructions== {{excerpt|{{quote|''quote''|''attribution''|''source''}}}} ===Notes=== *If any text is assigned to the ''source'' field, it will be rendered as a browser [[Wikipedia:Tool tip|tool tip]]. ==Example== ====Code==== {{excerpt|{{quote|The Force will be with you. Always.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope}}}} ====Result==== {{quote|The Force will be with you. Always.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope}} ==See also== *[[Template:Quotetrans]] *[[Template:Qlisten]] *[[Template:Quote2]] ==Note== As a heavily used, high-visibility template, this template is protected from editing by anonymous or newly registered users. [[Category:Utility templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

''"{{{1}}}"''
:- '''[[{{{2}}}|{{{3|{{{2|}}}}}}]] {{#if:{{{4|}}}|on {{{4|}}}}}''' ==Usage== {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody}} produces: {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody}} {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody|Somebody's full name}} produces: {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody|Somebody's full name}} {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody|Somebody's full name|topic}} produces: {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody|Somebody's full name|topic}} [[fr:modèle:citation]] [[Category:Quotation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{For|linking a subject to a collection of quotations on [[Wikiquote]]|Template:Wikiquote}} {{-}} {{{{FULLPAGENAME}}|{{lorem ipsum}}|Someone|Someone's full name|''Source''}}

“{{{1|Insert the text of the quote here, without quotation marks. {{lorem ipsum}}}}}”

{{#if:{{{2|Someone}}}|

—[[{{{2}}}|{{{3|{{{2|}}}}}}]]{{#if:{{{4|Source}}}|, {{{4}}}}}

}}
{{-}} ==Usage== {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody}} produces: {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody}} {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody|Somebody's full name}} produces: {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody|Somebody's full name}} {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody|Somebody's full name|topic}} produces: {{Quote|Phrase|Somebody|Somebody's full name|topic}} {{esoteric}} [[fr:modèle:citation]] [[it:Template:quote]] [[Category:Quotation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: wookiee copy rather
revision.text: :"''{{{1}}}''" :—{{{2}}}__NOTOC__ ==Usage instructions== {{excerpt|{{quote|''quote''|''attribution''|''source''}}}} ===Notes=== *If any text is assigned to the ''source'' field, it will be rendered as a browser [[Wikipedia:Tool tip|tool tip]]. ==Example== ====Code==== {{excerpt|{{quote|The Force will be with you. Always.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope}}}} ====Result==== {{quote|The Force will be with you. Always.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope}} ==See also== *[[Template:Quotetrans]] *[[Template:Qlisten]] *[[Template:Quote2]] ==Note== As a heavily used, high-visibility template, this template is protected from editing by anonymous or newly registered users. [[Category:Utility templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: wookiee copy rather
revision.text: :"''{{{1}}}''" :—{{{2}}}__NOTOC__ ==Usage instructions== {{excerpt|{{quote|''quote''|''attribution''|''source''}}}} ===Notes=== *If any text is assigned to the ''source'' field, it will be rendered as a browser [[Wikipedia:Tool tip|tool tip]]. ==Example== ====Code==== {{excerpt|{{quote|The Force will be with you. Always.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope}}}} ====Result==== {{quote|The Force will be with you. Always.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope}} ==See also== *[[Template:Quotetrans]] *[[Template:Qlisten]] *[[Template:Quote2]] ==Note== As a heavily used, high-visibility template, this template is protected from editing by anonymous or newly registered users. [[Category:Utility templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
